name: google-search-console
description: Reads Google Search Console sites, sitemaps, and Search Analytics performance reports (by date, query, page, country, and device) through the Search Console v3 REST API; submits/removes sites and sitemaps through explicit write actions.

risk.read: external Google Search Console API read of site/sitemap metadata and search analytics performance data
risk.write: adds or removes Search Console site properties and submits or deletes sitemap resources
risk.approval: reverse ETL writes require plan preview and approval token
